memories: User prefers using the Vim text editor and has a highly customized .vimrc file.
User is an amateur woodworker and specializes in making Japanese-style kumiko screens.
User believes that modern 'Agile' practices lead to sloppy code and a lack of long-term vision. User frequently mentions that 'a month of planning saves a year of coding'.
User is a Staff Software Engineer at a major financial services company, with over 20 years of experience in backend systems.
User is the go-to person for debugging critical production issues in the legacy transaction processing system.
User is coordinating a family reunion for next summer at a state park in Oregon.
User holds the opinion that comprehensive, detailed technical specification documents, written and approved before any code is written, are the only way to build reliable software.
query: Draft the 'Project Workflow and Planning' section of a junior developer onboarding guide introducing them to the team's software development lifecycle (SDLC) best practices.
